title: carlina bollei
intro: Carlina bollei, also known as Bolle's carline thistle, is a plant species within the sunflower family native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Carlina bollei include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Carlina bollei can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
